/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libquadrotor_core.a CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/config/quadrotor_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/clock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/cmd_vel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/imu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/odom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/converts/data/transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/control/motor_mixer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/controller/se3_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/math/geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/publisher/data/clock_data_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/publisher/data/imu_data_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/publisher/data/odom_data_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/publisher/data/transform_data_publisher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/ros2_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/ros/subscriber/data/cmd_vel_command_subscriber.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/runtime/data_board_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/runtime/goal_provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/runtime/vehicle_runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/sim/mujoco_actuator_writer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/sim/mujoco_bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/sim/mujoco_state_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quadrotor_core.dir/src/sim/quadrotor_sim.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libquadrotor_core.a
